content: ConfigError and ValidationError must be separate builder-pattern types in errors.rs with From<_> for GroveError. ProviderConfig field is provider_type (serde rename = 'type'). OverstoryConfig needs Default impl. Phase 0 library modules need #\![allow(dead_code)].

name: doctor-check-pattern
description: DoctorCheck: CheckStatus enum with serde lowercase, category as Option<String> with skip_serializing_if, build checks with vec![] macro then push for per-loop entries

content: MergeResolverOptions fields (ai_resolve_enabled, reimagine_enabled) and GitOutput.stderr need #[allow(dead_code)] during scaffold phases — they're reserved for future tiers 3-4. Use struct-level allow rather than field-level.
render_overlay replaces all {{VARIABLE}} placeholders; tests assert \!rendered.contains('{{') to catch missing replacements.
process module (src/process/) was dropped from main.rs in auto-resolve merge. Always verify mod declarations after merges. The fix: add 'mod process;' after 'mod merge;' in main.rs.

description: deploy_config() overwrites CLAUDE.md with empty string when called after write_overlay(). sling.rs passes empty overlay_content to deploy_config.
resolution: Skip fs::write in claude.rs when overlay_content is empty.

content: Coordinator event loop reopens DB connections every tick (not once at startup) for reliability — SQLite WAL mode allows concurrent access, and per-tick connections ensure the coordinator picks up schema changes across agent runs without restart.

name: single-lead-parallel-builders
description: Phase 4 bugfix: single lead with 2 parallel builders for non-overlapping file areas yields clean merges. 6 bugs fixed in one batch.
